name: scheduling
description: Schedule and manage tasks and appointments

steps.description: Parse the scheduling request to extract date, time, and task
Add the task to the schedule
Confirm scheduling and set up reminders

examples.input: Schedule a meeting for tomorrow at 2pm
examples.output: Parse datetime, check conflicts, add to calendar, confirm

examples.input: Remind me to call John on Friday
examples.output: Create reminder task, schedule notification, confirm
